title: What songs should be part of an unofficial EVA soundtrack
display_title: What songs should be part of an unofficial EVA soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: What songs should be part of an unofficial EVA soundtrack?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Aug 23, 2008 4:19 pm Randomly going through music I haven't listened to in quite a while and a particular song, "One Vision" by Queen , just screamed Gendo Ikari to me. Que mental image of Gendo, finally left alone in his office after a long day of menacing nameless employees, cranking up his speakers and just rocking out. For some reason I also picture him as portrayed by a bearded Kevin Spacey... go figure. So what random songs jump out at you guys and gals as really capturing the essence of a particular character or situation in EVA? The Wall need not be mentioned... far too obvious. Dig a little, folks!

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Aug 23, 2008 4:26 pm Wagner's Der Ring des Nibelungen: Just generally the whole of Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Aug 23, 2008 5:29 pm The Who's "Behind Blue Eyes" always struck me as a Shinji and Asuka song.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Sat Aug 23, 2008 5:34 pm Hmmmm... "Sonne" by Rammstein to introduce Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 23, 2008 5:36 pm @CorporalChaos For that purpose I'd vote either or both Crosby Stills Nash And Young - Love The One You're With Blve Öyster Cvlt - You're Not The One (I Was Looking For) as songs that fit the majority opinion.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sat Aug 23, 2008 5:51 pm Wait- didn't we already have a thread on this? I clearly remember someone asking about what music people identify with specific characters. I believe we all agreed at the time that Rammestien's Ich Will was the song that described Asuka. Edit: Oh, here it is: [url]http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=5377[/url] Granted, this topic could be taken in a different direction, but...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Aug 23, 2008 8:17 pm Ah, but that was asking what the characters themselves would listen to. By contrast, this thread asks what you listen to that makes you think of them, without all the bias that pleasant self-deceptions add to keep the characters from thinking of themselves as the miserable bastards they truely are. Granted, my opening example muddied that up a bit, but the point is that was a crazy image I had, not that the real Gendo we know and loathe/pity would ever actually act out. For instance, I suspect Asuka would object very strongly to me saying that the song "Save Yourself" by Stabbing Westward seems to fit her rather than Shinji, but it does. On a similar note, "What Do I Have to Do?" by the same band is quite descriptive of just how screwed up and one-sided Ritusko's relationship with Gendo is, but she'd never admit that until the very end.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Sat Aug 23, 2008 8:31 pm Ich Will is about attention whores. Take a wild guess how that applies to Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Aug 24, 2008 12:13 am "Godzilla"-Blue Oyster Cult Tremble! The Grandoise Theme of the Purple Monster that rules Tokyo-3 with and Iron Fist! Launch! Evangelion Unit-01!! is what they'd have to package it on the OST as.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Aug 24, 2008 12:03 pm Metallica: Hero of the Day

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Mon Aug 25, 2008 1:43 am CorporalChaos wrote: The Who's "Behind Blue Eyes" always struck me as a Shinji and Asuka song.

[]:             Quote Post by Rhyno » Mon Aug 25, 2008 8:56 pm I really think The Final Countdown should be thrown in there somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Aug 25, 2008 9:01 pm "To the Moon and Back" by Savage Garden seems a particularly Rei-like ditty.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Aug 26, 2008 8:59 am I think also of Verdi's Requiem, especially Dies Irae. I know it has been used for the advertisement for EoE, but Dies Irae would work so well with the actual thing also.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:37 am Cowboys from Hell should be played when the JSSDF invades NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:07 am "Metallica: Trapped Under Ice" for Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:41 am Rhyno wrote: I really think The Final Countdown should be thrown in there somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:59 am This is difficult. Running Up That Hill and Love Will Tear Us Apart come to mind as Evaish songs. Shishido's records are obviously perfect for Rei .

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Tue Aug 26, 2008 2:33 pm master_lloyd wrote: I think instead of Ode to Joy in episode 24, Journey's 'Anyway you want it' should be played as Kaworu invades C.Dogma.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Aug 26, 2008 5:35 pm Zuggy wrote: Running Up That Hill

Que mental image of Gendo, finally left alone in his office after a long day of menacing nameless employees, cranking up his speakers and just rocking out. For s
